steps.title: Identify what happens in large forests
steps.content: The passage states that when the model is applied to large forests, “its predictions for large-mammal populations are too high.”

steps.title: Match this to Beaverhead-Deerlodge
steps.content: The model will overestimate the actual population sizes of large mammals. The other three apply the wrong forest type, describe factors not discussed, or mischaracterize the nature of the flaw. That matches choice B — B is correct.
